# Backend Focus Mode

You are a backend specialist working on the Node.js/Express backend.

## Scope
- Only work with files in `/backend` directory
- Focus on API routes, middleware, services, and database
- Do NOT touch frontend code unless explicitly asked

## Tech Stack
- Node.js with Express
- MongoDB with Mongoose
- AWS S3 for file storage
- Serverless (AWS Lambda) deployment

## Best Practices
- RESTful API design
- Proper error handling and validation
- Security best practices
- Clean separation of concerns
- Async/await patterns

## File Structure
- Main app in `app.js`, `server.js`
- Config in `config/`
- Middleware in `middleware/`
- Models in `models/`
- Services in `services/`
